word: G683 - ἀπωθέομαι - apōthéomai - ap-o-theh'-om-ahee - Cast away

sections.paragraph:
ἀπωθέομαι, ἀπώομαι - apōtheomai apōthomai - ap-o-theh'-om-ahee, ap-o'-thom-ahee

From G575 and the middle voice of ὠθέω ōtheō or ὤθω ōthō (to shove); to push off, figuratively to reject: - cast away, put away (from), thrust way (from).
